SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ErrorCatalog
Catalog of errors for the persistence core module.
GenericBeanMapper<D,E>
A generic mapper for converting between domain models and database entities.
MapFailedException
Exception thrown when mapping between a domain object and an entity fails.
PageRequest
Represents a request for paginated data.
PageResponse<T>
Represents a paginated response containing a list of items and pagination metadata.
PostgreSQLConnectionPool
Configuration class for creating the PostgreSQL R2DBC Connection Pool.
PostgresqlConnectionProperties
Configuration properties for PostgreSQL database connection.
ReactiveAdapterOperation<D,E,I,R>
Deprecated.
since 1.0.4, use ReactiveOperationsHelper instead.
ReactiveOperationsHelper<D,E,I,R>
Helper base class for reactive operations, providing generic CRUD functionality.
